description.value: Your latest augmentation is a multifunction unit capable of processing metals of all types for a variety of purposes, a Metallic Augmentation Xtractor (MAX). You can use the benefits of the jury-rigging raxilite heritage once every 10 minutes, even if you don't have the heritage. If you have the heritage, you recover a number of Hit Points equal to seven times your level instead of five times your level.
